updates.title: GATE 2027 — Official Website Expected to Go Live
updates.description: The GATE 2027 organizing institute is expected to launch the official website with exam details by July-August 2026.

updates.title: Indian Air Force Accepts GATE Scores for Recruitment
updates.description: IAF has announced limited seats for engineering officers through GATE 2025/2026 score cards. This is a new entry pathway for GATE-qualified engineers.

updates.title: GATE 2026 Results Declared
updates.description: GATE 2026 results have been declared. Scorecards are available for download from the official GATE website.

updates.title: GATE 2026 Exam Conducted Successfully
updates.description: GATE 2026 was conducted across multiple shifts in February 2026 for all papers.

examPattern.negativeMaking: MCQ: 1/3 for 1-mark, 2/3 for 2-mark questions. No negative for MSQ & NAT.
